what_broke: 5 URLs (/guide/, /articles/, /consulting/, /insights/, /fueling-methodology/) 404/403'd in the global nav+footer on every page sitewide for months, unnoticed
root_cause: aspirational URLs — generators linked pages that were planned but never built
fix_applied: Removed dead links from header/footer; PRODUCTS dropdown now points at Plans+Courses; ARTICLES points at the live Substack
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() (via check_links.py) flags any dead same-site link; test_no_dead_link_targets enforces the known-good set
verified: docs/whoops-audit-jul2026.md — commit 47a4d0a; scripts/check_links.py built same night to keep it loud

what_broke: /questionnaire/ and /products/training-plans/ were stale pre-fix pages still carrying all 5 dead nav links + an unhashed A/B script
root_cause: questionnaire/training-plan pages weren't regenerated after the nav/footer fix shipped elsewhere
fix_applied: Regenerated /questionnaire/; added a 301 from /products/training-plans/ to canonical /training-plans/
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead /questionnaire/ or /coaching/ link as a RED money-path-404 (check_links.py SEED_PATHS includes /questionnaire/); check_money_path_wiring() guards the generator offline
verified: docs/whoops-audit-jul2026.md — round 2 fixes, same night as the round-1 audit

what_broke: 8 of 14 radar dimensions showed 0 on all 427 race pages
root_cause: gravel-god key names (e.g. length/elevation) were never fully remapped to the road fondo_rating dimension keys (distance/climbing/etc.) in the page generator
fix_applied: Key remap fixed in wordpress/generate_neo_brutalist.py; full regen + redeploy
regression_check: scripts/validate_profile.py (imported by immune_check.py's run_validate_profile()) flags any fondo_rating dimension that is missing or out of 1-5 range per profile
